prestazioni: 4G63T (7th-gen Lancer Evolution IX Wagon variant) forged internals with Manley 87mm stroker crank, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression pistons for 2.2L displacement, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 58mm compressor inducer) and custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe with Bellmouth Designs divorced wastegate dump tubes

HKS GT-SS Super SQV IV blow-off valve (part #15004-AK003) and Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust system with 304 stainless steel 2.5-inch piping, straight-through muffler, and dual 4-inch rolled-edge tips (Evo Wagon-specific fitment to clear rear subframe)

Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom CAN bus integration for Mitsubishi ACD (Active Center Differential) and AYC (Active Yaw Control) torque vectoring, running E85 flex-fuel with ID1000x injectors and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (PCV and crankcase ventilation separated)
estetica: Voltex Type-7 rear wing (Evo Wagon-specific mounting brackets to clear tailgate glass) with carbon fiber endplates and adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees), paired with a Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (rear fenders extended 50mm per side, front fenders 30mm) in raw carbon fiber with OEM-style paint-matched lower cladding

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 front and 18x10.5 +25 rear wheels (ET-specific offsets to clear Evo Wagon rear strut towers) wrapped in Toyo R888R 265/35/18 and 285/30/18 tires, with custom polycarbonate fender flares (3mm thick, bolt-on design) to accommodate wheel fitment

OEM+ front bumper lip with integrated LED DRLs (Mitsubishi Ralliart-style, part #MR965000EX) and custom rear diffuser (3D-printed ABS with carbon fiber weave overlay) featuring dual 3-inch exhaust cutouts and integrated tow hook cover (Evo Wagon-specific, accounting for rear bumper overhang)
